IT Officer with 4+ years of hands-on experience managing IT infrastructure, networks, and technical support across hospitality and technology environments in Kenya.

Skilled in PBX and VoIP telephony, CCTV surveillance, wireless network deployment, hotel POS platforms, CPanel administration, and hardware maintenance.

Currently supporting Peppercorn Resort & Dovenest Lodge in Naivasha — managing 100+ IP endpoints, ensuring 99% system uptime, and automating Front Office workflows that cut manual work by 60%.

// work_history

Work Experience

4+ years across hospitality IT, systems administration, and network engineering.

IT Officer
Peppercorn Resort & Dovenest Lodge
📅 Oct 2025 – Present · Naivasha, Kenya
  • Deploy and administer a dual-property PBX and IP phone system covering 100+ endpoints — maintaining zero unplanned telephony downtime since go-live.
  • Designed and executed a campus-wide wireless access point overhaul, eliminating dead zones across both properties.
  • Administer hotel POS systems sustaining 99%+ transaction uptime critical to Food & Beverage and front-desk operations.
  • Manage CPanel environments for email provisioning, domain management, and website updates — fully in-house.
  • Support OTA account management on Booking.com to protect online booking revenue.
  • Install, configure, and maintain CCTV surveillance across both hotel properties.
  • Built Excel automation tools cutting Front Office manual data entry by an estimated 60%.
PBX/VoIPCCTVPOSCPanelLAN/WANExcel Automation
Systems Administrator
Wodex Technologies Limited
📅 Jan 2025 – Sep 2025 · Nairobi, Kenya
  • Administered Windows Server, Active Directory, and Microsoft 365 for corporate clients at 99.9% SLA availability.
  • Configured firewalls, VLAN segmentation, and VPN solutions across multi-client environments.
  • Executed backup and disaster recovery operations with zero data loss incidents throughout tenure.
  • Managed Azure cloud infrastructure with resource right-sizing optimizations.
  • Maintained IT asset inventories and compliance records supporting audit readiness.
